title: Chopper Watches the Strangers
description: On pages 7–10, chopper watches the strangers as luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return.
scene: Chopper Watches the Strangers. Luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then tell me, what's the cause?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Alright, I'll leave the treatment to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Umm... I think you're supposed to do it the other way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A little too late for that now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And I can still see like, half your face.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: By the way, how's your fever?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Keep it down in there, chopper!

summary: This part centers on chopper watches the strangers, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
